title: muscaria acaulis
intro: Muscaria acaulis, also known as the leafless fly polypore, is a type of fungus belonging to the Polyporaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antifungal and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Muscaria acaulis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Muscaria acaulis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
